title: Login requests time out after ~30s on slow networks
body:
### Description

When the network is slow (throttled to ~150kbps in Chrome DevTools), the login request hangs for about 30 seconds and then fails with a generic "Something went wrong" toast instead of a clearer timeout message.

### Steps to reproduce

1. Open the app and go to the login page.
2. Throttle the network to "Slow 3G" in DevTools.
3. Submit valid credentials.
4. Wait ~30 seconds.

### Expected behavior

Either the request should complete in a reasonable time, or the UI should show a specific "request timed out, please retry" message well before 30 seconds.

### Actual behavior

The UI just spins and then shows a generic error toast.

### Environment

- Browser: Chrome 126
- OS: macOS 14.5
- App version: 2.3.1 (fake)

This is a fixture for Arena's github-maintainer-dungeon scenario (issue-triage happy-path trial). It is entirely synthetic test data — no real project, user, or issue.
